text.title: Google Ads Account Foundations Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real google-ads-basics engagements. Each pairs a symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: PMax launched with 5 conv/mo; budget burnt in 'asset group' bucket; no insight.
antipattern.fix: Run Search + Shopping until ≥30 conv/mo, then layer PMax.

antipattern.symptom: Account has 600 SKAGs; reporting unmanageable; QS spread thin.
antipattern.fix: Consolidate to 1 theme = 10-20 keywords per ad group.

antipattern.symptom: Ads run with no sitelinks; CTR 20% below benchmark.
antipattern.fix: Block launch until ≥3 extension types are configured.
